ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device type (e.g., IoT, Industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., devicemultiplier, InitialD-Svoltage) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Current value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default entry */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device whose parameter was changed */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter that was modified */,
  "changed_value" REAL /* New value set for the parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES device_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being monitored */,
  "current_temperature" REAL /* Current temperature of the device */,
  "current_voltage" REAL /* Current voltage of the device */,
  "last_check" TEXT /* Date of the last status check */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the device */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device generating the alert */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter linked to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES device_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device with the installed software */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_software_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_hardware" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device with the installed hardware */,
  "hardware_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_hardware_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
